[[File:Excalibur detail.png|left|130x200px]]
'''Excalibur''' is a one-handed [[sword]] and a [[quest item]] obtained from the [[Merlin's Crystal]] [[quest]] and used in the [[Holy Grail]] quest. It requires 20 [[Attack]] to wield and has similar [[equipment stats|stats]] to the [[adamant longsword]], except for 6 less [[strength bonus]] and 1 more magic defence. 

In the Merlin's Crystal quest, the player must use Excalibur on the crystal to smash and free [[Merlin]]. It is obtained from [[Lady of the Lake]] after she tests the purity of the player's spirit when giving a [[beggar]] [[bread]] at [[Grum's Gold Exchange]] in [[Port Sarim]].

In the Holy Grail quest, Excalibur '''must''' be equipped as the [[Black Knight Titan]] dies in order to enter the [[Fisher Realm]] and be able to continue the quest. If another weapon is equipped when he dies, the fight will restart. 

Low level players may find Excalibur useful for combat because of its stats, low requirements to obtain and wield, and is free the first time.

If lost, it can be retrieved from the [[Lady of the Lake]] in [[Taverley]] for {{NoCoins|500}} coins.

==Special attack==
[[File:Sanctuary.gif|thumb|200px|''A player performing the Excalibur's special attack, '''Sanctuary'''''.]]
Excalibur has a [[special attack]], ''Sanctuary'', which temporarily increases the player's [[Defence]] by 8 and consumes 100% special attack energy.
